title: task
description:
Follow-up to project-LICHEN-57un. Remaining headers need nullability annotations:

HAL: hal.h (many functions)
RPL: rpl.h, rpl_trickle.h, rpl_messages.h, rpl_dodag.h, rpl_routing.h, rpl_addr.h
CoAP: coap_client.h, coap_oscore.h
SenML: senml.h
App: app_identity.h, app_interface.h, hal_bridge.h
Mesh adapters: meshcore/adapter.h, meshcore/codec.h, meshtastic/adapter.h, meshtastic/codec.h

Core link-layer and crypto headers were annotated in project-LICHEN-57un.
